title: Refactor AgentBackgroundService to Event Bus
description: Modify AgentBackgroundService to inject IDashboardEventBus instead of pushing directly to HubContext. Replace PushStatusToDashboardAsync, PushGoalToDashboardAsync, queue/chat/journal pushes with _dashboardBus.PublishAsync(new XxxChangedEvent(...)). Reference: blazor-dashboard-improvement-v2.md Section 5
